option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="content_desc_dark_mode">Dark mode icon</string> <string name="content_desc_language_setting">Language settings icon</string> <string name="content_desc_info_icon">Info icon</string> <string name="settings_dark_mode">Dark mode</string> <string name="settings_about">About</string> <string name="settings_version_format">Version: %1$s</string> <string name="settings_author_format">Author: %1$s</string> <string name="settings_repo_label">Repo: </string> <string name="settings_repo_name">GitHub</string> <string name="settings_license_notice">Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0. Commercial use is prohibited.</string> <string name="settings_links_header">Links/References:</string> <string name="settings_link_madorunes">Madorunes website</string> <string name="settings_link_moegirl">Moegirl Wiki</string> <string name="settings_contributors_header">Contributors:</string> <string name="bottom_bar_dict">Dictionary</string> <string name="bottom_bar_converter">Converter</string> <string name="bottom_bar_settings">Settings</string> <string name="settings_title">Settings</string> <string name="settings_language_label">Language</string> </resources>
